title: Baltics, Nordics, USA discuss NATO summit
summary_full: On 1–2 June 2026, the regular meeting of the E-PINE (Enhanced Partnership in Northern Europe) format took place in Tallinn and Narva, Estonia, bringing together representatives of the Baltic States, the Nordic countries, and the United States of America (USA). Latvia was represented by Juris Poikāns, Ambassador-at-Large, according to a release from the Latvian Ministry of Foreign Affairs.
